title: US MTCS — Mercer Total Compensation Survey for the Energy Sector (Downstream and Oilfield Services)
description: Pay data for professional, managerial and executive roles specific to the downstream and oilfield services segments of the US energy sector. Includes base pay, short-term incentives (STI), long-term incentives (LTI), and organizational metrics across 116 critical roles from 238 organizations.
countriesRegions: US regions — Midwest (East/West North Central), Northeast (Middle Atlantic, New England), South (East South Central, South Atlantic, West South Central), Texas, West (Mountain, Pacific)
notes: Energy-sector cut of Mercer's flagship MTCS, focused on downstream (refining, retail, petrochemicals) and oilfield services. Strong for US regional benchmarking and includes industry-specific operational roles like Drilling Operations, Refining Operations, and Oilfield Services.
